description_long: This refrigerator features a rectangular, boxy form with a flat top and smooth, unadorned surfaces. The front face includes a recessed handle and a subtle seam indicating a single door, while a thin, dark strip runs vertically along one edge, likely representing a hinge or seal. The top surface is mostly plain, with a small, square, raised section that may serve as a handle or access panel. The overall finish is a uniform light gray, giving it a modern, utilitarian appearance suitable for urban environments such as garages or service areas. There are no visible brand logos, control panels, or decorative elements, emphasizing its functional design. The refrigerator appears robust and capable of supporting objects on its flat surfaces.
description: A modern, rectangular refrigerator with a smooth light gray finish, recessed handle, and minimalistic design. Features a flat top and a subtle seam indicating a single door.
description_view_0: Front view showing the recessed handle and door seam, with a small raised section on the left side of the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat, featureless surface and the thin dark strip along the edge, with the handle and raised section visible on top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain surface with the door seam and raised section now on the right side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat surface, dark strip, and the handle and raised section on top.
attribute_door_handle_style: Recessed rectangular handle integrated into the front door, flush with the surface.
